title: その子も誰かのかわいい子

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... What an adorable little doll you are! It
seems I've fallen for you at first sight!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Blond hair and eyes like those on the wings of a
morpho butterfly... Ah, you're just so entrancing!

text_block_list.name: Doll Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
She really is beautiful, isn't she? Unfortunately,
though, another customer arranged to take her
home just a few moments ago...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see. So she's been sold, yes? I suppose with
a lovely doll like you, it was just a matter of time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. It seems it wasn't meant to be, but I wish
you happiness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to take home the doll she fell in love with,
a disheartened Mejiro Bright leaves the shop.
